<content>1: # AgentCube Implementation Plan
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: This document provides a detailed implementation plan for Architectural Requirements AR-034 through AR-043, mapping to the specification documents in `./specs/`. Each AR includes file paths, precise logic, and implementation details.
6: 
7: ---
8: 
9: ## AR-034: CI/CD Workflows - Additional GitHub Actions
10: 
11: **Spec Reference:** `specs/ci-cd/spec.md`, `specs/ci-cd/design.md`
12: 
13: ### Status: PARTIAL - Missing Workflows
14: 
15: ### Files to Create:
16: 
17: | File | Description |
18: |------|-------------|
19: | `.github/workflows/codegen-check.yml` | Verify generated code matches `make gen-all` |
20: | `.github/workflows/copyright-check.yml` | Ensure copyright headers are present |
21: | `.github/workflows/codespell.yml` | Spelling check with codespell |
22: | `.github/workflows/build-push-release.yml` | Multi-arch image push to GHCR |
23: | `.github/workflows/dify-plugin-publish.yml` | Publish Dify plugin on tag |
24: | `.github/workflows/workflows-approve.yml` | Approve first-time contributor workflows |
25: 
26: ### Key Logic:
27: 
28: **codegen-check.yml:**
29: ```yaml
30: name: Codegen Check
31: 
32: on:
33:   pull_request:
34:     branches: [main, 'release-*']
35: 
36: jobs:
37:   codegen-check:
38:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
39:     steps:
40:       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
41:       - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
42:         id: filter
43:         with:
44:           filters: |
45:             codegen:
46:               - 'pkg/apis/**'
47:               - 'hack/**'
48:               - '.github/workflows/**'
49:               - 'Makefile'
50:       - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
51:         if: steps.filter.outputs.codegen == 'true'
52:         with:
53:           go-version: '1.24.4'
54:       - run: make gen-check
55:         if: steps.filter.outputs.codegen == 'true'
56: ```
57: 
58: **copyright-check.yml:**
59: ```yaml
60: name: Copyright Check
61: 
62: on:
63:   pull_request:
64:     branches: [main, 'release-*']
65: 
66: jobs:
67:   build:
68:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
69:     steps:
70:       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
71:       - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
72:         id: filter
73:         with:
74:           filters: |
75:             copyright:
76:               - '**'
77:               - '!**/*.md'
78:               - '!**/*.svg'
79:               - '!**/*.png'
80:               - '!docs/**'
81:               - '!.github/**'
82:       - run: sudo apt-get install -y moreutils
83:         if: steps.filter.outputs.copyright == 'true'
84:       - run: make gen-copyright
85:         if: steps.filter.outputs.copyright == 'true'
86:       - run: git diff --exit-code
87:         if: steps.filter.outputs.copyright == 'true'
88: ```
89: 
90: **codespell.yml:**
91: ```yaml
92: name: Codespell
93: 
94: on:
95:   pull_request:
96:     branches: [main, 'release-*']
97: 
98: jobs:
99:   codespell:
100:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
101:     steps:
102:       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
103:       - name: Backup files causing false positives
104:         run: |
105:           find . -name 'pyproject.toml' -exec mv {} {}.bak \;
106:           find . -name 'package-lock.json' -exec mv {} {}.bak \;
107:           find . -name 'package.json' -exec mv {} {}.bak \;
108:       - run: pip install codespell
109:       - run: |
110:           codespell --check-filenames \
111:             --skip=".git,*.pyc,*.svg,*.png,*.jpg,*.gif,*.ico,go.sum" \
112:             --ignore-words-list="fo,nam,te,notin,NotIn" .
113:       - name: Restore files
114:         if: always()
115:         run: |
116:           find . -name '*.bak' -exec sh -c 'mv "$1" "${1%.bak}"' _ {} \;
117: ```

119: **build-push-release.yml:**
120: ```yaml
121: name: Build and Push Release Images
122: 
123: on:
124:   push:
125:     branches: [main]
126:     tags: ['v*.*.*', 'v*.*.*-*']
127: 
128: jobs:
129:   build-and-push:
130:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
131:     permissions:
132:       packages: write
133:     steps:
134:       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
135:       - uses: actions/setup-go@v4
136:         with:
137:           go-version: '1.24.4'
138:       - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v2
139:       - uses: docker/login-action@v3
140:         with:
141:           registry: ghcr.io
142:           username: ${{ github.actor }}
143:           password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
144:       - name: Set TAG
145:         run: |
146:           if [[ "${{ github.ref_type }}" == "tag" ]]; then
147:             echo "TAG=${{ github.ref_name }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
148:           else
149:             echo "TAG=latest" >> $GITHUB_ENV
150:           fi
151:       - run: make docker-buildx-push
152:         env:
153:           IMAGE_REGISTRY: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}
154:           WORKLOAD_MANAGER_IMAGE: workloadmanager:${{ env.TAG }}
155:       - run: make docker-buildx-push-router
156:         env:
157:           IMAGE_REGISTRY: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}
158:           ROUTER_IMAGE: agentcube-router:${{ env.TAG }}
159:       - run: make docker-buildx-push-picod
160:         env:
161:           IMAGE_REGISTRY: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}
162:           PICOD_IMAGE: picod:${{ env.TAG }}
163: ```

165: **dify-plugin-publish.yml:**
166: ```yaml
167: name: Dify Plugin Publish
168: 
169: on:
170:   push:
171:     tags: ['dify-plugin/v*']
172: 
173: jobs:
174:   publish:
175:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
176:     steps:
177:       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
178:       - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
179:         with:
180:           python-version: '3.12'
181:       - run: pip install dify-plugin==0.0.6 yq
182:       - name: Read manifest
183:         id: manifest
184:         run: |
185:           echo "author=$(yq .author integrations/dify-plugin/manifest.yaml)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
186:           echo "name=$(yq .name integrations/dify-plugin/manifest.yaml)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
187:       - run: |
188:           cd integrations/dify-plugin
189:           dify-plugin package
190:       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
191:         with:
192:           repository: ${{ steps.manifest.outputs.author }}/dify-plugins
193:           token: ${{ secrets.PLUGIN_ACTION }}
194:           path: dify-plugins
195:       - run: |
196:           mv integrations/dify-plugin/*.difypkg dify-plugins/
197:           cd dify-plugins
198:           git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
199:           git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
200:           git add .
201:           git commit -m "Add ${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }} plugin"
202:           git push origin HEAD:plugin/${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }}
203:       - run: |
204:           gh pr create \
205:             --repo langgenius/dify-plugins \
206:             --head "${{ steps.manifest.outputs.author }}:plugin/${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }}" \
207:             --title "Add ${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }} plugin" \
208:             --body "Automated plugin publish"
209:         env:
210:           GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PLUGIN_ACTION }}
211: ```

213: **workflows-approve.yml:**
214: ```yaml
215: name: Approve Workflows
216: 
217: on:
218:   pull_request_target:
219:     types: [labeled, synchronize]
220:     branches: [main, 'release-**']
221: 
222: jobs:
223:   approve:
224:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
225:     if: |
226:       github.event.action == 'labeled' && github.event.label.name == 'ok-to-test' ||
227:       github.event.action == 'synchronize'
228:     steps:
229:       - uses: actions/github-script@v7
230:         with:
231:           script: |
232:             const { owner, repo } = context.repo;
233:             const sha = context.payload.pull_request.head.sha;
234:             
235:             const prs = await github.rest.pulls.list({
236:               owner,
237:               repo,
238:               state: 'all',
239:               creator: context.payload.pull_request.user.login
240:             });
241:             
242:             const isFirstTime = prs.data.length <= 1;
243:             const hasOkToTest = context.payload.pull_request.labels.some(l => l.name === 'ok-to-test');
244:             
245:             if (!isFirstTime || hasOkToTest) {
246:               const runs = await github.rest.actions.listWorkflowRunsForRepo({
247:                 owner,
248:                 repo,
249:                 head_sha: sha,
250:                 status: 'action_required'
251:               });
252:               
253:               for (const run of runs.data.workflow_runs) {
254:                 await github.rest.actions.approveWorkflowRun({
255:                   owner,
256:                   repo,
257:                   run_id: run.id
258:                 });
259:                 core.info(`Approved workflow run ${run.id}`);
260:               }
261:             }
262: ```

615: ### Key Logic:
616: 
617: **docker/Dockerfile (Workload Manager):**
618: ```dockerfile
619: # Build stage
620: FROM golang:1.24.9-alpine AS builder
621: 
622: WORKDIR /workspace
623: 
624: RUN apk add --no-cache git
625: 
626: COPY go.mod go.sum ./
627: RUN go mod download
628: 
629: COPY cmd/ pkg/ ./
630: RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/go-build \
631:     CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=${TARGETARCH:-amd64} \
632:     go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o workloadmanager ./cmd/workload-manager
633: 
634: # Runtime stage
635: FROM alpine:3.19
636: 
637: RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates
638: 
639: WORKDIR /app
640: 
641: COPY --from=builder /workspace/workloadmanager .
642: 
643: RUN adduser -D -u 1000 apiserver
644: 
645: USER apiserver
646: 
647: EXPOSE 8080
648: 
649: ENTRYPOINT ["/app/workloadmanager"]
650: 
651: CMD ["--port=8080"]
652: ```

941: **tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.py:**
942: ```python
943: from collections.abc import Generator
944: from typing import Any
945: 
946: from dify_plugin import Tool
947: from dify_plugin.entities.tool import ToolInvokeMessage
948: 
949: import sys
950: sys.path.insert(0, '/app/agentcube-sdk')
951: from agentcube import CodeInterpreterClient
952: 
953: 
954: class AgentcubeCodeInterpreterTool(Tool):
955:     def _invoke(self, tool_parameters: dict[str, Any]) -> Generator[ToolInvokeMessage]:
956:         result = self.execute(**tool_parameters)
957:         yield self.create_json_message(result)
958: 
959:     def execute(
960:         self,
961:         router_url: str = None,
962:         workload_manager_url: str = None,
963:         language: str = "python",
964:         code_interpreter_id: str = None,
965:         session_id: str = None,
966:         code: str = None,
967:         command: str = None,
968:         session_reuse: bool = False,
969:         **kwargs
970:     ) -> dict[str, Any]:
971:         result = {
972:             "success": False,
973:             "output": "",
974:             "error": None,
975:             "session_id": None,
976:         }
977:         
978:         effective_session_id = session_id if session_reuse else None
979:         
980:         try:
981:             with CodeInterpreterClient(
982:                 router_url=router_url,
983:                 workload_manager_url=workload_manager_url,
984:                 session_id=effective_session_id,
985:                 code_interpreter_name=code_interpreter_id,
986:             ) as client:
987:                 if code:
988:                     exec_result = client.run_code(code, language=language)
989:                     result["output"] = exec_result.get("stdout", "")
990:                     result["error"] = exec_result.get("stderr", "") if exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) != 0 else None
991:                     result["success"] = exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) == 0
992:                 elif command:
993:                     exec_result = client.execute_command(command)
994:                     result["output"] = exec_result.get("stdout", "")
995:                     result["error"] = exec_result.get("stderr", "") if exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) != 0 else None
996:                     result["success"] = exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) == 0
997:                 
998:                 result["session_id"] = client.session_id
999:                 
1000:         except Exception as e:
1001:             result["error"] = str(e)
1002:             result["success"] = False
1003:         
1004:         return result
1005: ```
1006: 
1007: **requirements.txt:**
1008: ```
1009: dify-plugin>=0.4.2,<0.5.0
1010: agentcube-sdk>=0.0.10
1011: ```

1032: 
1033: **pcap_analyzer.py:**
1034: ```python
1035: import os
1036: import sys
1037: from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
1038: 
1039: from fastapi import FastAPI, File, Form, HTTPException, UploadFile
1040: from pydantic import BaseModel
1041: import uvicorn
1042: 
1043: sys.path.insert(0, '/app/agentcube')
1044: from agentcube import CodeInterpreterClient
1045: from agentcube.exceptions import CommandExecutionError
1046: 
1047: API_KEY = os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")
1048: API_BASE_URL = os.getenv("OPENAI_API_BASE", "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1")
1049: MODEL_NAME = os.getenv("OPENAI_MODEL", "Qwen/QwQ-32B")
1050: CODEINTERPRETER_NAME = os.getenv("CODEINTERPRETER_NAME", "my-interpreter")
1051: SANDBOX_NAMESPACE = os.getenv("SANDBOX_NAMESPACE", "default")
1052: SANDBOX_WARMUP_SEC = int(os.getenv("SANDBOX_WARMUP_SEC", "5"))
1053: 
1054: SERVER_HOST = "0.0.0.0"
1055: SERVER_PORT = 8000
1056: SERVER_RELOAD = True
1057: 
1058: from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
1059: from langgraph.prebuilt import create_react_agent
1060: from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, AIMessage
1061: 
1062: 
1063: class SandboxRunner:
1064:     def __init__(self, name: str = "my-interpreter", namespace: str = "default", warmup_sec: int = 5):
1065:         self.name = name
1066:         self.namespace = namespace
1067:         self.warmup_sec = warmup_sec
1068:         self.client: Optional[CodeInterpreterClient] = None
1069:     
1070:     def _ensure_client(self, router_url: str, workload_manager_url: str):
1071:         if self.client is None:
1072:             self.client = CodeInterpreterClient(
1073:                 router_url=router_url,
1074:                 workload_manager_url=workload_manager_url,
1075:                 code_interpreter_name=self.name,
1076:             )
1077:     
1078:     def upload_file(self, local_path: str, remote_path: str, router_url: str, workload_manager_url: str) -> bool:
1079:         self._ensure_client(router_url, workload_manager_url)
1080:         try:
1081:             self.client.upload_file(local_path, remote_path)
1082:             return True
1083:         except Exception as e:
1084:             print(f"Upload failed: {e}")
1085:             return False
1086:     
1087:     def upload_bytes(self, data: bytes, remote_path: str, router_url: str, workload_manager_url: str) -> bool:
1088:         self._ensure_client(router_url, workload_manager_url)
1089:         try:
1090:             self.client.write_file(remote_path, data.decode('utf-8', errors='replace'))
1091:             return True
1092:         except Exception as e:
1093:             print(f"Upload bytes failed: {e}")
1094:             return False
1095:     
1096:     def run(self, command: str, router_url: str, workload_manager_url: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1097:         self._ensure_client(router_url, workload_manager_url)
1098:         try:
1099:             result = self.client.execute_command(command)
1100:             return {
1101:                 "stdout": result.get("stdout", ""),
1102:                 "stderr": result.get("stderr", ""),
1103:                 "exit_code": result.get("exit_code", 0),
1104:             }
1105:         except CommandExecutionError as e:
1106:             return {
1107:                 "stdout": "",
1108:                 "stderr": str(e),
1109:                 "exit_code": e.exit_code,
1110:             }
1111:     
1112:     def stop(self):
1113:         if self.client:
1114:             self.client.stop()
1115:             self.client = None
1116: 
1117: 
1118: def build_react_agent(llm, system_prompt: str):
1119:     return create_react_agent(llm, [], state_modifier=system_prompt)
1120: 
1121: 
1122: def invoke_react_agent(agent, user_text: str) -> str:
1123:     result = agent.invoke({"messages": [HumanMessage(content=user_text)]})
1124:     messages = result.get("messages", [])
1125:     for msg in reversed(messages):
1126:         if isinstance(msg, AIMessage):
1127:             return msg.content
1128:     return ""
1129: 
1130: 
1131: def build_planner_agent(llm):
1132:     return build_react_agent(
1133:         llm,
1134:         "You are a network security expert. Given a PCAP file, write Python scripts using scapy to analyze it."
1135:     )
1136: 
1137: 
1138: def build_reporter_agent(llm):
1139:     return build_react_agent(
1140:         llm,
1141:         "You are a security analyst. Given execution results from PCAP analysis tools, write a comprehensive security report."
1142:     )
1143: 
1144: 
1145: class AnalyzeResponse(BaseModel):
1146:     script: str
1147:     results: List[Dict[str, Any]]
1148:     report: str
1149: 
1150: 
1151: PLANNER = None
1152: REPORTER = None
1153: ROUTER_URL = os.getenv("ROUTER_URL", "")
1154: WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL = os.getenv("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL", "")
1155: 
1156: 
1157: def on_startup():
1158:     global PLANNER, REPORTER
1159:     if not API_KEY:
1160:         raise RuntimeError("OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable is required")
1161:     
1162:     llm = ChatOpenAI(
1163:         api_key=API_KEY,
1164:         base_url=API_BASE_URL,
1165:         model=MODEL_NAME,
1166:     )
1167:     PLANNER = build_planner_agent(llm)
1168:     REPORTER = build_reporter_agent(llm)
1169:     print("Startup complete: LLM agents initialized")
1170: 
1171: 
1172: app = FastAPI(
1173:     title="PCAP Analyzer",
1174:     on_startup=[on_startup],
1175: )
1176: 
1177: 
1178: @app.post("/analyze", response_model=AnalyzeResponse)
1179: async def analyze_endpoint(
1180:     pcap_file: Optional[UploadFile] = File(None),
1181:     pcap_path: Optional[str] = Form(None),
1182: ):
1183:     if not pcap_file and not pcap_path:
1184:         raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Either pcap_file or pcap_path is required")
1185:     
1186:     runner = SandboxRunner(
1187:         name=CODEINTERPRETER_NAME,
1188:         namespace=SANDBOX_NAMESPACE,
1189:         warmup_sec=SANDBOX_WARMUP_SEC,
1190:     )
1191:     
1192:     try:
1193:         if pcap_file:
1194:             pcap_bytes = await pcap_file.read()
1195:             remote_pcap = f"/tmp/{pcap_file.filename}"
1196:             runner.upload_bytes(pcap_bytes, remote_pcap, ROUTER_URL, WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL)
1197:             local_pcap = remote_pcap
1198:         else:
1199:             local_pcap = pcap_path
1200:         
1201:         script = invoke_react_agent(PLANNER, f"Analyze PCAP file at {local_pcap}")
1202:         
1203:         results = []
1204:         exec_result = runner.run(f"python3 -c '{script}'", ROUTER_URL, WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL)
1205:         results.append(exec_result)
1206:         
1207:         if exec_result.get("exit_code", 0) != 0:
1208:             repaired = invoke_react_agent(
1209:                 PLANNER,
1210:                 f"Previous script failed with error: {exec_result.get('stderr')}. Fix it."
1211:             )
1212:             exec_result = runner.run(f"python3 -c '{repaired}'", ROUTER_URL, WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL)
1213:             results.append(exec_result)
1214:             script = repaired
1215:         
1216:         report = invoke_react_agent(REPORTER, f"Write a report based on: {results}")
1217:         
1218:         return AnalyzeResponse(script=script, results=results, report=report)
1219:     
1220:     finally:
1221:         runner.stop()
1222: 
1223: 
1224: if __name__ == "__main__":
1225:     uvicorn.run(app, host=SERVER_HOST, port=SERVER_PORT, reload=SERVER_RELOAD)
1226: ```
1227:

1323: 
1324: **Spec Reference:** `specs/ci-cd/design.md` (E2E section)
1325:

1341: ### Key Logic:
1342: 
1343: **run_e2e.sh:**
1344: ```bash
1345: #!/usr/bin/env bash
1346: 
1347: set -euo pipefail
1348: 
1349: E2E_CLUSTER_NAME="${E2E_CLUSTER_NAME:-agentcube-e2e}"
1350: E2E_SKIP_SETUP="${E2E_SKIP_SETUP:-false}"
1351: E2E_CLEAN_CLUSTER="${E2E_CLEAN_CLUSTER:-true}"
1352: E2E_VENV_DIR="${E2E_VENV_DIR:-/tmp/agentcube-e2e-venv}"
1353: AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE="${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE:-agentcube}"
1354: AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION="${AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION:-v0.1.1}"
1355: WORKLOAD_MANAGER_LOCAL_PORT="${WORKLOAD_MANAGER_LOCAL_PORT:-8080}"
1356: ROUTER_LOCAL_PORT="${ROUTER_LOCAL_PORT:-8081}"
1357: REDIS_IMAGE="${REDIS_IMAGE:-redis:7-alpine}"
1358: 
1359: ARTIFACTS_PATH="${ARTIFACTS_PATH:-/tmp/agentcube-e2e-artifacts}"
1360: mkdir -p "${ARTIFACTS_PATH}"
1361: 
1362: run_setup() {
1363:     echo "=== Setting up E2E environment ==="
1364:     
1365:     if kind get clusters | grep -q "${E2E_CLUSTER_NAME}"; then
1366:         if [[ "${E2E_CLEAN_CLUSTER}" == "true" ]]; then
1367:             echo "Deleting existing cluster..."
1368:             kind delete cluster --name "${E2E_CLUSTER_NAME}"
1369:         else
1370:             echo "Cluster already exists, skipping creation"
1371:             return
1372:         fi
1373:     fi
1374:     
1375:     echo "Creating Kind cluster..."
1376:     kind create cluster --name "${E2E_CLUSTER_NAME}"
1377:     
1378:     echo "Installing agent-sandbox CRDs..."
1379:     kubectl apply --validate=false -f "https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox/releases/download/${AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION}/manifest.yaml"
1380:     kubectl apply --validate=false -f "https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox/releases/download/${AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION}/extensions.yaml"
1381:     
1382:     echo "Pulling and loading images..."
1383:     docker pull "registry.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/agent-sandbox-controller:${AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION}"
1384:     docker pull python:3.9-slim
1385:     kind load docker-image "registry.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/agent-sandbox-controller:${AGENT_SANDBOX_VERSION}" --name "${E2E_CLUSTER_NAME}"
1386:     kind load docker-image python:3.9-slim --name "${E2E_CLUSTER_NAME}"
1387:     
1388:     echo "Building local images..."
1389:     make docker-build docker-build-router docker-build-picod
1390:     kind load docker-image workloadmanager:latest agentcube-router:latest picod:latest --name "${E2E_CLUSTER_NAME}"
1391:     
1392:     echo "Deploying Redis..."
1393:     kubectl create namespace "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" || true
1394:     kubectl apply -n "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" -f - <<EOF
1395: apiVersion: apps/v1
1396: kind: Deployment
1397: metadata:
1398:   name: redis
1399: spec:
1400:   replicas: 1
1401:   selector:
1402:     matchLabels:
1403:       app: redis
1404:   template:
1405:     metadata:
1406:       labels:
1407:         app: redis
1408:     spec:
1409:       containers:
1410:         - name: redis
1411:           image: ${REDIS_IMAGE}
1412:           ports:
1413:             - containerPort: 6379
1414: ---
1415: apiVersion: v1
1416: kind: Service
1417: metadata:
1418:   name: redis
1419: spec:
1420:   selector:
1421:     app: redis
1422:   ports:
1423:     - port: 6379
1424:       targetPort: 6379
1425: EOF
1426:     
1427:     echo "Waiting for Redis..."
1428:     kubectl wait --for=condition=available --timeout=60s deployment/redis -n "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}"
1429:     
1430:     echo "Deploying AgentCube with Helm..."
1431:     helm upgrade --install agentcube manifests/charts/base \
1432:         --namespace "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" \
1433:         --create-namespace \
1434:         --set redis.addr="redis.${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}.svc.cluster.local:6379" \
1435:         --set redis.password="" \
1436:         --set workloadmanager.image.repository="workloadmanager" \
1437:         --set workloadmanager.image.tag="latest" \
1438:         --set-json 'workloadmanager.extraEnv=[{"name":"REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED","value":"false"},{"name":"JWT_KEY_SECRET_NAMESPACE","value":"agentcube"}]' \
1439:         --set router.image.repository="agentcube-router" \
1440:         --set router.image.tag="latest" \
1441:         --set router.rbac.create=true \
1442:         --set router.serviceAccountName="agentcube-router" \
1443:         --set-json 'router.extraEnv=[{"name":"REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED","value":"false"}]' \
1444:         --wait
1445:     
1446:     echo "Applying test fixtures..."
1447:     kubectl apply -f test/e2e/echo_agent.yaml
1448:     sed 's/sessionTimeout: "15m"/sessionTimeout: "30s"/' test/e2e/echo_agent.yaml | kubectl apply -f -
1449:     kubectl apply -f test/e2e/e2e_code_interpreter.yaml
1450:     
1451:     echo "Setting up port forwards..."
1452:     kubectl port-forward svc/workloadmanager -n "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" ${WORKLOAD_MANAGER_LOCAL_PORT}:8080 &
1453:     WORKLOAD_PF_PID=$!
1454:     kubectl port-forward svc/agentcube-router -n "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" ${ROUTER_LOCAL_PORT}:8080 &
1455:     ROUTER_PF_PID=$!
1456:     
1457:     sleep 5
1458:     
1459:     echo "Waiting for health endpoints..."
1460:     curl -s --retry 10 --retry-delay 2 "http://localhost:${WORKLOAD_MANAGER_LOCAL_PORT}/health" || true
1461:     curl -s --retry 10 --retry-delay 2 "http://localhost:${ROUTER_LOCAL_PORT}/health/live" || true
1462:     
1463:     echo "Creating test service account..."
1464:     kubectl create serviceaccount e2e-test -n "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" || true
1465:     kubectl create clusterrolebinding e2e-test-binding --clusterrole=workloadmanager --serviceaccount="${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}:e2e-test" || true
1466:     export API_TOKEN=$(kubectl create token e2e-test -n "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" --duration=24h)
1467:     
1468:     echo "Setting up Python venv..."
1469:     python3 -m venv "${E2E_VENV_DIR}"
1470:     "${E2E_VENV_DIR}/bin/pip" install -e ./sdk-python
1471:     
1472:     echo "Setup complete!"
1473: }
1474: 
1475: run_tests() {
1476:     echo "=== Running E2E tests ==="
1477:     
1478:     export WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL="http://localhost:${WORKLOAD_MANAGER_LOCAL_PORT}"
1479:     export ROUTER_URL="http://localhost:${ROUTER_LOCAL_PORT}"
1480:     export API_TOKEN
1481:     export AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE
1482:     
1483:     echo "Running Go tests..."
1484:     go test -v ./test/e2e/...
1485:     
1486:     echo "Running Python tests..."
1487:     cd test/e2e
1488:     "${E2E_VENV_DIR}/bin/python" test_codeinterpreter.py --verbose
1489:     cd -
1490: }
1491: 
1492: collect_logs() {
1493:     echo "Collecting logs to ${ARTIFACTS_PATH}..."
1494:     kubectl logs -n "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" -l app=workloadmanager --tail=1000 > "${ARTIFACTS_PATH}/workloadmanager.log" 2>&1 || true
1495:     kubectl logs -n "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" -l app=agentcube-router --tail=1000 > "${ARTIFACTS_PATH}/router.log" 2>&1 || true
1496:     kubectl get pods -n "${AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE}" -o wide > "${ARTIFACTS_PATH}/pods.txt" 2>&1 || true
1497: }
1498: 
1499: cleanup() {
1500:     echo "=== Cleaning up ==="
1501:     kind delete cluster --name "${E2E_CLUSTER_NAME}" || true
1502:     rm -rf /tmp/agent-sandbox || true
1503: }
1504: 
1505: main() {
1506:     if [[ "${E2E_SKIP_SETUP}" != "true" ]]; then
1507:         run_setup
1508:     fi
1509:     
1510:     if run_tests; then
1511:         echo "All tests passed!"
1512:         exit 0
1513:     else
1514:         echo "Tests failed!"
1515:         collect_logs
1516:         exit 1
1517:     fi
1518: }
1519: 
1520: trap cleanup EXIT
1521: main
1522: ```
1523: 
1524: **e2e_test.go:**
1525: ```go
1526: package e2e
1527: 
1528: import (
1529: 	"context"
1530: 	"os"
1531: 	"testing"
1532: 	"time"
1533: 
1534: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
1535: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
1536: )
1537: 
1538: func TestMain(m *testing.M) {
1539: 	os.Exit(m.Run())
1540: }
1541: 
1542: func TestWorkloadManagerHealth(t *testing.T) {
1543: 	url := os.Getenv("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL")
1544: 	require.NotEmpty(t, url, "WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL must be set")
1545: 	
1546: 	client := NewTestClient(url, os.Getenv("API_TOKEN"))
1547: 	
1548: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
1549: 	defer cancel()
1550: 	
1551: 	health, err := client.Health(ctx)
1552: 	require.NoError(t, err)
1553: 	assert.Equal(t, "healthy", health.Status)
1554: }
1555: 
1556: func TestRouterHealth(t *testing.T) {
1557: 	url := os.Getenv("ROUTER_URL")
1558: 	require.NotEmpty(t, url, "ROUTER_URL must be set")
1559: 	
1560: 	client := NewTestClient(url, "")
1561: 	
1562: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
1563: 	defer cancel()
1564: 	
1565: 	health, err := client.Live(ctx)
1566: 	require.NoError(t, err)
1567: 	assert.Equal(t, "alive", health.Status)
1568: }
1569: 
1570: func TestCreateAndInvokeAgentRuntime(t *testing.T) {
1571: 	wmURL := os.Getenv("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL")
1572: 	routerURL := os.Getenv("ROUTER_URL")
1573: 	token := os.Getenv("API_TOKEN")
1574: 	namespace := os.Getenv("AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE")
1575: 	
1576: 	require.NotEmpty(t, wmURL)
1577: 	require.NotEmpty(t, routerURL)
1578: 	require.NotEmpty(t, namespace)
1579: 	
1580: 	wmClient := NewTestClient(wmURL, token)
1581: 	routerClient := NewTestClient(routerURL, "")
1582: 	
1583: 	ctx := context.Background()
1584: 	
1585: 	resp, err := wmClient.CreateSandbox(ctx, &CreateSandboxRequest{
1586: 		Kind:      "AgentRuntime",
1587: 		Name:      "echo-agent",
1588: 		Namespace: namespace,
1589: 	})
1590: 	require.NoError(t, err)
1591: 	require.NotEmpty(t, resp.SessionID)
1592: 	
1593: 	defer wmClient.DeleteSandbox(ctx, resp.SessionID)
1594: 	
1595: 	invokeResp, err := routerClient.Invoke(ctx, namespace, "echo-agent", map[string]interface{}{
1596: 		"message": "hello",
1597: 	})
1598: 	require.NoError(t, err)
1599: 	assert.Contains(t, invokeResp, "message")
1600: }
1601: ```

# AgentCube Implementation Plan

## Overview

This document provides a detailed implementation plan for Architectural Requirements AR-034 through AR-043, mapping to the specification documents in `./specs/`. Each AR includes file paths, precise logic, and implementation details.

---

## AR-034: CI/CD Workflows - Additional GitHub Actions

**Spec Reference:** `specs/ci-cd/spec.md`, `specs/ci-cd/design.md`

### Status: PARTIAL - Missing Workflows

### Files to Create:

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `.github/workflows/codegen-check.yml` | Verify generated code matches `make gen-all` |
| `.github/workflows/copyright-check.yml` | Ensure copyright headers are present |

1870: **hack/update-codegen.sh:**
1871: ```bash
1872: #!/usr/bin/env bash
1873: 
1874: set -euo pipefail
1875: 
1876: SCRIPT_ROOT=$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/..
1877: CODEGEN_PKG=${CODEGEN_PKG:-$(cd "${SCRIPT_ROOT}" && ls -d -1 ./vendor/k8s.io/code-generator 2>/dev/null || echo ../k8s.io/code-generator)}
1878: 
1879: source "${CODEGEN_PKG}/kube_codegen.sh"
1880: 
1881: # Generate client for runtime/v1alpha1
1882: kube::codegen::gen_client \
1883:     --with-watch \
1884:     --output-dir "${SCRIPT_ROOT}/client-go" \
1885:     --output-pkg "github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/client-go" \
1886:     --boilerplate "${SCRIPT_ROOT}/hack/boilerplate.go.txt" \
1887:     --one-input-api "runtime/v1alpha1" \
1888:     "${SCRIPT_ROOT}/pkg/apis"
1889: 
1890: # Post-process lister files to add GroupResource method
1891: for file in client-go/listers/runtime/v1alpha1/agentruntime.go client-go/listers/runtime/v1alpha1/codeinterpreter.go; do
1892:     if [[ -f "${file}" ]]; then
1893:         resource_name=$(basename "${file}" .go)
1894:         if [[ "${resource_name}" == "agentruntime" ]]; then
1895:             resource="agentruntimes"
1896:         else
1897:             resource="codeinterpreters"
1898:         fi
1899:         echo "
1900: // GroupResource returns the group resource of the ${resource_name}.
1901: func (*${resource_name^}) GroupResource() schema.GroupResource {
1902:     return schema.GroupResource{Group: \"runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh\", Resource: \"${resource}\"}
1903: }" >> "${file}"
1904:     fi
1905: done
1906: 
1907: echo "Code generation complete."
1908: ```

1922: 
1923: # Process Go files
1924: find "${SCRIPT_ROOT}" -name "*.go" -not -path "*/vendor/*" -not -path "*/venv/*" | while read -r file; do
1925:     if ! grep -q "Copyright The Volcano Authors" "${file}"; then
1926:         echo "Adding copyright to ${file}"
1927:         echo "${GO_HEADER}" | cat - "${file}" > "${file}.tmp" && mv "${file}.tmp" "${file}"
1928:     fi
1929: done

1997: ```markdown
1998: # AgentCube
1999: 
2000: AgentCube is a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents.
2001: 
2002: ## Overview
2003: 
2004: AgentCube provisions isolated sandbox pods on demand, routes HTTP traffic to them through session-aware proxies, and manages their lifecycle (creation, expiry, idle cleanup).
2005: 
2006: ## Features
2007: 
2008: - **Sandbox Orchestration**: Kubernetes CRDs for AgentRuntime and CodeInterpreter
2009: - **Session Routing**: HTTP proxy with JWT authentication
2010: - **Idle Cleanup**: Automatic cleanup of inactive sandboxes
2011: - **Python SDK**: Easy-to-use client library
2012: - **CLI Toolkit**: Developer-friendly command-line interface
2013: 
2014: ## Quick Start
2015: 
2016: ### Prerequisites
2017: 
2018: - Kubernetes 1.28+
2019: - Helm 3.x
2020: - Redis/Valkey
2021: 
2022: ### Install with Helm
2023: 
2024: ```bash
2025: helm upgrade --install agentcube manifests/charts/base \
2026:   --namespace agentcube --create-namespace \
2027:   --set redis.addr="redis.agentcube.svc.cluster.local:6379" \
2028:   --set redis.password=""
2029: ```
2030: 
2031: ### Using the Python SDK
2032: 
2033: ```python
2034: from agentcube import CodeInterpreterClient
2035: 
2036: with CodeInterpreterClient(
2037:     router_url="http://router.example.com:8080",
2038:     workload_manager_url="http://workloadmanager.example.com:8080"
2039: ) as client:
2040:     result = client.run_code("print('Hello, AgentCube!')")
2041:     print(result["stdout"])
2042: ```
2043: 
2044: ## Components
2045: 
2046: | Component | Description |
2047: |-----------|-------------|
2048: | Workload Manager | Sandbox creation and lifecycle management |
2049: | Router | Session-aware HTTP proxy |
2050: | PicoD | Code execution daemon |
2051: | AgentD | Idle cleanup controller |
2052: | Python SDK | Client library for AgentCube |
2053: | CLI | Developer toolkit |
2054: 
2055: ## Documentation
2056: 
2057: - [Getting Started](docs/getting-started.md)
2058: - [Architecture](docs/architecture.md)
2059: - [API Reference](docs/api-reference.md)
2060: - [CLI Reference](docs/cli-reference.md)
2061: 
2062: ## License
2063: 
2064: Apache 2.0
2065: ```
2066: 
2067: ---
2068:

14: func main() {
15: 	port := flag.String("port", "8080", "API port")
16: 	runtimeClassName := flag.String("runtime-class-name", "kuasar-vmm", "Runtime class name")
17: 	enableTLS := flag.Bool("enable-tls", false, "Enable TLS")
18: 	tlsCert := flag.String("tls-cert", "", "TLS certificate path")
19: 	tlsKey := flag.String("tls-key", "", "TLS key path")
20: 	enableAuth := flag.Bool("enable-auth", false, "Enable authentication")
21: 
22: 	klog.InitFlags(nil)
23: 	flag.Parse()
24: 
25: 	config := &workloadmanager.Config{
26: 		Port:             *port,
27: 		RuntimeClassName: *runtimeClassName,
28: 		EnableTLS:        *enableTLS,
29: 		TLSCert:          *tlsCert,
30: 		TLSKey:           *tlsKey,
31: 		EnableAuth:       *enableAuth,
32: 	}
33: 
34: 	if *enableTLS && (*tlsCert == "" || *tlsKey == "") {
35: 		klog.Fatal("TLS enabled but cert/key not provided")
36: 	}
37: 
38: 	server, err := workloadmanager.NewServer(config)
39: 	if err != nil {
40: 		klog.Fatalf("Failed to create server: %v", err)
41: 	}
42: 
43: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
44: 	defer cancel()
45: 
46: 	sigCh := make(chan os.Signal, 1)
47: 	signal.Notify(sigCh, syscall.SIGINT, syscall.SIGTERM)
48: 
49: 	go func() {
50: 		<-sigCh
51: 		klog.Info("Shutting down server...")
52: 		if err := server.Shutdown(ctx); err != nil {
53: 			klog.Errorf("Server shutdown error: %v", err)
54: 		}
55: 		cancel()
56: 	}()
57: 
58: 	if err := server.Start(ctx); err != nil {
59: 		klog.Fatalf("Server error: %v", err)
60: 	}
61: }

12: 	metricsserver "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/metrics/server"
13: )
14: 
15: var schemeBuilder = runtime.NewScheme()
16: 
17: func init() {
18: 	utilruntime.Must(corev1.AddToScheme(schemeBuilder))
19: 	utilruntime.Must(sandboxv1alpha1.AddToScheme(schemeBuilder))
20: }
21: 
22: func main() {
23: 	mgr, err := ctrl.NewManager(ctrl.GetConfigOrDie(), ctrl.Options{
24: 		Scheme:                 schemeBuilder,
25: 		Metrics:                metricsserver.Options{BindAddress: "0"},
26: 		HealthProbeBindAddress: "0",
27: 	})
28: 	if err != nil {
29: 		os.Exit(1)
30: 	}
31: 
32: 	if err := ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).
33: 		For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}).
34: 		Complete(&agentd.Reconciler{
35: 			Client: mgr.GetClient(),
36: 			Scheme: mgr.GetScheme(),
37: 		}); err != nil {
38: 		os.Exit(1)
39: 	}
40: 
41: 	if err := mgr.Start(ctrl.SetupSignalHandler()); err != nil {
42: 		os.Exit(1)
43: 	}
44: }

<content>1: package workloadmanager
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"errors"
6: 	"fmt"
7: 	"net/http"
8: 	"strings"
9: 	"sync"
10: 	"time"
11: 
12: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
13: 	"github.com/google/uuid"
14: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
15: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
16: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2"
17: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2/h2c"
18: 	authenticationv1 "k8s.io/api/authentication/v1"
19: 	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
20: 	apierrors "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
21: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
22: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1/unstructured"
23: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema"
24: 	"k8s.io/client-go/dynamic"
25: 	"k8s.io/client-go/dynamic/dynamicinformer"
26: 	"k8s.io/client-go/informers"
27: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
28: 	"k8s.io/client-go/rest"
29: 	"k8s.io/client-go/tools/clientcmd"
30: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
31: )
32: 
33: const (
34: 	DefaultSandboxTTL         = 8 * time.Hour
35: 	DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
36: )
37: 
38: var (
39: 	SessionIdLabelKey         = "runtime.agentcube.io/session-id"
40: 	WorkloadNameLabelKey      = "runtime.agentcube.io/workload-name"
41: 	SandboxNameLabelKey       = "runtime.agentcube.io/sandbox-name"
42: 	LastActivityAnnotationKey = "last-activity-time"
43: 	IdleTimeoutAnnotationKey  = "runtime.agentcube.io/idle-timeout"
44: )
45: 
46: type ErrorResponse struct {
47: 	Message string `json:"message"`
48: }
49: 
50: type Config struct {
51: 	Port             string
52: 	RuntimeClassName string
53: 	EnableTLS        bool
54: 	TLSCert          string
55: 	TLSKey           string
56: 	EnableAuth       bool
57: }
58: 
59: type Server struct {
60: 	config            *Config
61: 	router            *gin.Engine
62: 	httpServer        *http.Server
63: 	k8sClient         *K8sClient
64: 	sandboxController *SandboxReconciler
65: 	tokenCache        *TokenCache
66: 	informers         *Informers
67: 	storeClient       store.Store
68: 	wg                sync.WaitGroup
69: }
70: 
71: func NewServer(config *Config) (*Server, error) {
72: 	s := &Server{
73: 		config:      config,
74: 		storeClient: store.Storage(),
75: 		tokenCache:  NewTokenCache(1000, 5*time.Minute),
76: 	}
77: 
78: 	if err := s.initK8sClient(); err != nil {
79: 		return nil, err
80: 	}
81: 
82: 	s.sandboxController = NewSandboxReconciler(s.k8sClient, s.storeClient)
83: 
84: 	gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
85: 	s.router = gin.New()
86: 
87: 	s.setupRoutes()
88: 
89: 	return s, nil
90: }
91: 
92: func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
93: 	s.router.GET("/health", s.handleHealth)
94: 
95: 	v1 := s.router.Group("/v1")
96: 	{
97: 		v1.Use(loggingMiddleware())
98: 		if s.config.EnableAuth {
99: 			v1.Use(s.authMiddleware())
100: 		}
101: 		v1.POST("/agent-runtime", s.handleAgentRuntimeCreate)
102: 		v1.DELETE("/agent-runtime/sessions/:sessionId", s.handleDeleteSandbox)
103: 		v1.POST("/code-interpreter", s.handleCodeInterpreterCreate)
104: 		v1.DELETE("/code-interpreter/sessions/:sessionId", s.handleDeleteSandbox)
105: 	}
106: }
107: 
108: func (s *Server) handleHealth(c *gin.Context) {
109: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "healthy"})
110: }
111: 
112: func (s *Server) handleAgentRuntimeCreate(c *gin.Context) {
113: 	var req types.CreateSandboxRequest
114: 	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
115: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{Message: "Invalid request body"})
116: 		return
117: 	}
118: 
119: 	req.Kind = types.AgentRuntimeKind
120: 	if err := req.Validate(); err != nil {
121: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{Message: err.Error()})
122: 		return
123: 	}
124: 
125: 	resp, err := s.createSandbox(c.Request.Context(), &req, types.AgentRuntimeKind)
126: 	if err != nil {
127: 		s.handleError(c, err)
128: 		return
129: 	}
130: 
131: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, resp)
132: }
133: 
134: func (s *Server) handleCodeInterpreterCreate(c *gin.Context) {
135: 	var req types.CreateSandboxRequest
136: 	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
137: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{Message: "Invalid request body"})
138: 		return
139: 	}
140: 
141: 	req.Kind = types.CodeInterpreterKind
142: 	if err := req.Validate(); err != nil {
143: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{Message: err.Error()})
144: 		return
145: 	}
146: 
147: 	resp, err := s.createSandbox(c.Request.Context(), &req, types.CodeInterpreterKind)
148: 	if err != nil {
149: 		s.handleError(c, err)
150: 		return
151: 	}
152: 
153: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, resp)
154: }
155: 
156: func (s *Server) createSandbox(ctx context.Context, req *types.CreateSandboxRequest, kind string) (*types.CreateSandboxResponse, error) {
157: 	sessionID := uuid.New().String()
158: 	sandboxID := uuid.New().String()
159: 	sandboxName := fmt.Sprintf("%s-%s", req.Name, sandboxID[:8])
160: 
161: 	sandboxInfo := &types.SandboxInfo{
162: 		Kind:             kind,
163: 		SandboxID:        sandboxID,
164: 		SandboxNamespace: req.Namespace,
165: 		Name:             sandboxName,
166: 		SessionID:        sessionID,
167: 		CreatedAt:        time.Now(),
168: 		ExpiresAt:        time.Now().Add(DefaultSandboxTTL),
169: 		Status:           "pending",
170: 	}
171: 
172: 	if err := s.storeClient.StoreSandbox(ctx, sandboxInfo); err != nil {
173: 		return nil, err
174: 	}
175: 
176: 	sandboxObj := s.buildSandboxObject(sandboxInfo, req, kind)
177: 
178: 	watchCh := s.sandboxController.WatchSandboxOnce(sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace, sandboxInfo.Name)
179: 
180: 	dynamicClient := s.k8sClient.dynamicClient
181: 	gvr := SandboxGVR
182: 	unstructuredObj := &unstructured.Unstructured{Object: sandboxObj}
183: 	_, err := dynamicClient.Resource(gvr).Namespace(sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace).Create(ctx, unstructuredObj, metav1.CreateOptions{})
184: 	if err != nil {
185: 		s.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
186: 		return nil, err
187: 	}
188: 
189: 	select {
190: 	case <-watchCh:
191: 		podIP, err := s.resolvePodIP(ctx, sandboxInfo)
192: 		if err != nil {
193: 			s.rollbackSandbox(ctx, sandboxInfo, kind)
194: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to resolve pod IP: %w", err)
195: 		}
196: 
197: 		entryPoints := s.buildEntryPoints(sandboxInfo, podIP)
198: 		sandboxInfo.EntryPoints = entryPoints
199: 		sandboxInfo.Status = "running"
200: 
201: 		if err := s.storeClient.UpdateSandbox(ctx, sandboxInfo); err != nil {
202: 			klog.Warningf("failed to update sandbox: %v", err)
203: 		}
204: 
205: 		return &types.CreateSandboxResponse{
206: 			SessionID:   sessionID,
207: 			SandboxID:   sandboxID,
208: 			SandboxName: sandboxName,
209: 			EntryPoints: entryPoints,
210: 		}, nil
211: 	case <-time.After(2 * time.Minute):
212: 		s.rollbackSandbox(ctx, sandboxInfo, kind)
213: 		return nil, errors.New("sandbox creation timed out")
214: 	case <-ctx.Done():
215: 		s.rollbackSandbox(ctx, sandboxInfo, kind)
216: 		return nil, ctx.Err()
217: 	}
218: }
219: 
220: func (s *Server) rollbackSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxInfo *types.SandboxInfo, kind string) {
221: 	deleteCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
222: 	defer cancel()
223: 
224: 	gvr := SandboxGVR
225: 	s.k8sClient.dynamicClient.Resource(gvr).Namespace(sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace).Delete(deleteCtx, sandboxInfo.Name, metav1.DeleteOptions{})
226: 	s.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sandboxInfo.SessionID)
227: }
228: 
229: func (s *Server) resolvePodIP(ctx context.Context, sandboxInfo *types.SandboxInfo) (string, error) {
230: 	podName := sandboxInfo.Name
231: 
232: 	pod, err := s.k8sClient.podLister.Pods(sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace).Get(podName)
233: 	if err != nil {
234: 		return "", err
235: 	}
236: 
237: 	if pod.Status.Phase != corev1.PodRunning {
238: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("pod is not running: %s", pod.Status.Phase)
239: 	}
240: 
241: 	if pod.Status.PodIP == "" {
242: 		return "", errors.New("pod has no IP")
243: 	}
244: 
245: 	return pod.Status.PodIP, nil
246: }
247: 
248: func (s *Server) buildEntryPoints(sandboxInfo *types.SandboxInfo, podIP string) []types.SandboxEntryPoint {
249: 	return []types.SandboxEntryPoint{
250: 		{
251: 			Path:     "/",
252: 			Protocol: "HTTP",
253: 			Endpoint: fmt.Sprintf("%s:8080", podIP),
254: 		},
255: 	}
256: }

258: func (s *Server) buildSandboxObject(sandboxInfo *types.SandboxInfo, req *types.CreateSandboxRequest, kind string) map[string]interface{} {
259: 	return map[string]interface{}{
260: 		"apiVersion": "agents.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1",
261: 		"kind":       "Sandbox",
262: 		"metadata": map[string]interface{}{
263: 			"name":      sandboxInfo.Name,
264: 			"namespace": sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace,
265: 			"labels": map[string]string{
266: 				"managed-by":         "agentcube-workload-manager",
267: 				SessionIdLabelKey:    sandboxInfo.SessionID,
268: 				WorkloadNameLabelKey: req.Name,
269: 				SandboxNameLabelKey:  sandboxInfo.Name,
270: 			},
271: 			"annotations": map[string]string{
272: 				LastActivityAnnotationKey: time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339),
273: 				IdleTimeoutAnnotationKey:  DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout.String(),
274: 			},
275: 		},
276: 		"spec": map[string]interface{}{
277: 			"lifecycle": map[string]interface{}{
278: 				"shutdownTime": time.Now().Add(DefaultSandboxTTL).Format(time.RFC3339),
279: 			},
280: 			"replicas": 1,
281: 		},
282: 	}
283: }
284: 
285: func (s *Server) handleDeleteSandbox(c *gin.Context) {
286: 	sessionID := c.Param("sessionId")
287: 
288: 	sandboxInfo, err := s.storeClient.GetSandboxBySessionID(c.Request.Context(), sessionID)
289: 	if err != nil {
290: 		if errors.Is(err, store.ErrNotFound) {
291: 			c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, ErrorResponse{Message: fmt.Sprintf("Session ID %s not found, maybe already deleted", sessionID)})
292: 			return
293: 		}
294: 		s.handleError(c, err)
295: 		return
296: 	}
297: 
298: 	var gvr schema.GroupVersionResource
299: 	if sandboxInfo.Kind == types.SandboxClaimsKind {
300: 		gvr = SandboxClaimGVR
301: 	} else {
302: 		gvr = SandboxGVR
303: 	}
304: 
305: 	err = s.k8sClient.dynamicClient.Resource(gvr).Namespace(sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace).Delete(c.Request.Context(), sandboxInfo.Name, metav1.DeleteOptions{})
306: 	if err != nil && !apierrors.IsNotFound(err) {
307: 		s.handleError(c, err)
308: 		return
309: 	}
310: 
311: 	s.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(c.Request.Context(), sessionID)
312: 
313: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "Sandbox deleted successfully"})
314: }
315: 
316: func (s *Server) handleError(c *gin.Context, err error) {
317: 	klog.Errorf("error handling request: %v", err)
318: 	c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, ErrorResponse{Message: "internal server error"})
319: }
320: 
321: func loggingMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
322: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
323: 		start := time.Now()
324: 		c.Next()
325: 		klog.Infof("%s %s %d %v", c.Request.Method, c.Request.URL.Path, c.Writer.Status(), time.Since(start))
326: 	}
327: }
328: 
329: func (s *Server) authMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
330: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
331: 		authHeader := c.GetHeader("Authorization")
332: 		if authHeader == "" {
333: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, ErrorResponse{Message: "Missing authorization header"})
334: 			return
335: 		}
336: 
337: 		parts := strings.Split(authHeader, " ")
338: 		if len(parts) != 2 || parts[0] != "Bearer" {
339: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, ErrorResponse{Message: "Invalid authorization header format"})
340: 			return
341: 		}
342: 
343: 		token := parts[1]
344: 		username, err := s.validateServiceAccountToken(c.Request.Context(), token)
345: 		if err != nil {
346: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, ErrorResponse{Message: "Invalid token"})
347: 			return
348: 		}
349: 
350: 		c.Set("userToken", token)
351: 		c.Set("username", username)
352: 		c.Next()
353: 	}
354: }
355: 
356: func (s *Server) validateServiceAccountToken(ctx context.Context, token string) (string, error) {
357: 	if username, ok := s.tokenCache.Get(token); ok {
358: 		return username, nil
359: 	}
360: 
361: 	review := &authenticationv1.TokenReview{
362: 		Spec: authenticationv1.TokenReviewSpec{
363: 			Token: token,
364: 		},
365: 	}
366: 
367: 	result, err := s.k8sClient.clientset.AuthenticationV1().TokenReviews().Create(ctx, review, metav1.CreateOptions{})
368: 	if err != nil {
369: 		return "", err
370: 	}
371: 
372: 	if !result.Status.Authenticated {
373: 		return "", errors.New("token not authenticated")
374: 	}
375: 
376: 	username := result.Status.User.Username
377: 	s.tokenCache.Set(token, username)
378: 
379: 	return username, nil
380: }
381: 
382: func (s *Server) initK8sClient() error {
383: 	config, err := rest.InClusterConfig()
384: 	if err != nil {
385: 		kubeconfig := clientcmd.NewDefaultClientConfigLoadingRules().GetDefaultFilename()
386: 		config, err = clientcmd.BuildConfigFromFlags("", kubeconfig)
387: 		if err != nil {
388: 			return err
389: 		}
390: 	}
391: 
392: 	config.QPS = 50
393: 	config.Burst = 100
394: 
395: 	clientset, err := kubernetes.NewForConfig(config)
396: 	if err != nil {
397: 		return err
398: 	}
399: 
400: 	dynamicClient, err := dynamic.NewForConfig(config)
401: 	if err != nil {
402: 		return err
403: 	}
404: 
405: 	informerFactory := informers.NewSharedInformerFactory(clientset, 15*time.Minute)
406: 	podInformer := informerFactory.Core().V1().Pods()
407: 	dynamicInformer := dynamicinformer.NewDynamicSharedInformerFactory(dynamicClient, 15*time.Minute)
408: 
409: 	s.k8sClient = &K8sClient{
410: 		clientset:       clientset,
411: 		dynamicClient:   dynamicClient,
412: 		baseConfig:      config,
413: 		clientCache:     NewClientCache(100),
414: 		podLister:       podInformer.Lister(),
415: 		podInformer:     podInformer.Informer(),
416: 		informerFactory: informerFactory,
417: 		dynamicInformer: dynamicInformer,
418: 	}
419: 
420: 	agentRuntimeInformer := dynamicInformer.ForResource(AgentRuntimeGVR).Informer()
421: 	codeInterpreterInformer := dynamicInformer.ForResource(CodeInterpreterGVR).Informer()
422: 	sandboxInformer := dynamicInformer.ForResource(SandboxGVR).Informer()
423: 
424: 	s.informers = &Informers{
425: 		agentRuntimeInformer:    agentRuntimeInformer,
426: 		codeInterpreterInformer: codeInterpreterInformer,
427: 		podInformer:             podInformer.Informer(),
428: 		sandboxInformer:         sandboxInformer,
429: 	}
430: 
431: 	informerFactory.Start(context.Background().Done())
432: 	dynamicInformer.Start(context.Background().Done())
433: 
434: 	return nil
435: }
436: 
437: func (s *Server) Start(ctx context.Context) error {
438: 	addr := ":" + s.config.Port
439: 
440: 	h2s := &http2.Server{}
441: 	handler := h2c.NewHandler(s.router, h2s)
442: 
443: 	s.httpServer = &http.Server{
444: 		Addr:        addr,
445: 		Handler:     handler,
446: 		ReadTimeout: 15 * time.Second,
447: 		IdleTimeout: 90 * time.Second,
448: 	}
449: 
450: 	if err := s.storeClient.Ping(ctx); err != nil {
451: 		return fmt.Errorf("store ping failed: %w", err)
452: 	}
453: 
454: 	if s.informers != nil {
455: 		syncCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Minute)
456: 		defer cancel()
457: 		if err := s.informers.WaitForSync(syncCtx); err != nil {
458: 			return fmt.Errorf("failed to sync informers: %w", err)
459: 		}
460: 	}
461: 
462: 	go s.runGarbageCollector(ctx)
463: 
464: 	klog.Infof("Starting workload manager server on %s", addr)
465: 	return s.httpServer.ListenAndServe()
466: }
467: 
468: func (s *Server) Shutdown(ctx context.Context) error {
469: 	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 15*time.Second)
470: 	defer cancel()
471: 	return s.httpServer.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
472: }
473: 
474: func (s *Server) runGarbageCollector(ctx context.Context) {
475: 	ticker := time.NewTicker(15 * time.Second)
476: 	defer ticker.Stop()
477: 
478: 	for {
479: 		select {
480: 		case <-ctx.Done():
481: 			return
482: 		case <-ticker.C:
483: 			s.garbageCollect(ctx)
484: 		}
485: 	}
486: }
487: 
488: func (s *Server) garbageCollect(ctx context.Context) {
489: 	gcCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 2*time.Minute)
490: 	defer cancel()
491: 
492: 	inactiveCutoff := time.Now().Add(-DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout)
493: 	inactive, err := s.storeClient.ListInactiveSandboxes(gcCtx, inactiveCutoff, 16)
494: 	if err != nil {
495: 		klog.Warningf("failed to list inactive sandboxes: %v", err)
496: 	}
497: 
498: 	expired, err := s.storeClient.ListExpiredSandboxes(gcCtx, time.Now(), 16)
499: 	if err != nil {
500: 		klog.Warningf("failed to list expired sandboxes: %v", err)
501: 	}
502: 
503: 	seen := make(map[string]bool)
504: 	for _, sandbox := range append(inactive, expired...) {
505: 		if seen[sandbox.SessionID] {
506: 			continue
507: 		}
508: 		seen[sandbox.SessionID] = true
509: 
510: 		var gvr schema.GroupVersionResource
511: 		if sandbox.Kind == types.SandboxClaimsKind {
512: 			gvr = SandboxClaimGVR
513: 		} else {
514: 			gvr = SandboxGVR
515: 		}
516: 
517: 		err := s.k8sClient.dynamicClient.Resource(gvr).Namespace(sandbox.SandboxNamespace).Delete(gcCtx, sandbox.Name, metav1.DeleteOptions{})
518: 		if err != nil && !apierrors.IsNotFound(err) {
519: 			klog.Warningf("failed to delete sandbox %s: %v", sandbox.Name, err)
520: 			continue
521: 		}
522: 
523: 		s.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(gcCtx, sandbox.SessionID)
524: 	}
525: }

164: func (tc *TokenCache) Get(token string) (string, bool) {
165: 	tc.mu.RLock()
166: 	defer tc.mu.RUnlock()
167: 	entry, ok := tc.tokens[token]
168: 	if !ok {
169: 		return "", false
170: 	}
171: 	if time.Since(entry.lastAccess) > tc.ttl {
172: 		return "", false
173: 	}
174: 	entry.lastAccess = time.Now()
175: 	return entry.username, true

206: 	r.mu.Lock()

208: 	r.mu.Unlock()

214: 	key := types.NamespacedName{Namespace: namespace, Name: name}

216: 	r.mu.RLock()
217: 	ch, ok := r.watchers[key]
218: 	r.mu.RUnlock()
219: 
220: 	if ok {
221: 		select {
222: 		case ch <- struct{}{}:
223: 		default:
224: 		}
225: 	}

228: func (r *SandboxReconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req types.NamespacedName) error {
229: 	sandbox, err := r.k8sClient.dynamicClient.Resource(SandboxGVR).Namespace(req.Namespace).Get(ctx, req.Name, metav1.GetOptions{})
230: 	if err != nil {
231: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
232: 			return nil
233: 		}
234: 		return err
235: 	}
236: 
237: 	status := sandbox.Object["status"]
238: 	if status == nil {
239: 		return nil
240: 	}
241: 
242: 	statusMap, ok := status.(map[string]interface{})
243: 	if !ok {
244: 		return nil
245: 	}
246: 
247: 	conditions, ok := statusMap["conditions"].([]interface{})
248: 	if !ok {
249: 		return nil
250: 	}
251: 
252: 	for _, c := range conditions {
253: 		cond, ok := c.(map[string]interface{})
254: 		if !ok {
255: 			continue
256: 		}
257: 		if cond["type"] == "Ready" && cond["status"] == "True" {
258: 			r.NotifySandboxRunning(req.Namespace, req.Name)
259: 			break
260: 		}
261: 	}
262: 
263: 	return nil
264: }

22: 	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
23: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/api"
24: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
25: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
26: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2"
27: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2/h2c"
28: 	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
29: 	k8serrors "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
30: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
31: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
32: 	"k8s.io/client-go/rest"
33: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
34: )
35: 
36: const LastActivityAnnotationKey = "agentcube.volcano.sh/last-activity"
37: 
38: type Config struct {
39: 	Port                  string
40: 	Debug                 bool
41: 	EnableTLS             bool
42: 	TLSCert               string
43: 	TLSKey                string
44: 	MaxConcurrentRequests int
45: }
46: 
47: type Server struct {
48: 	config         *Config
49: 	engine         *gin.Engine
50: 	httpServer     *http.Server
51: 	sessionManager SessionManager
52: 	storeClient    store.Store
53: 	httpTransport  *http.Transport
54: 	jwtManager     *JWTManager
55: }
56: 
57: type SessionManager interface {
58: 	GetSandboxBySession(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, namespace string, name string, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
59: }
60: 
61: type manager struct {
62: 	storeClient         store.Store
63: 	workloadMgrAddr     string
64: 	httpClient          *http.Client
65: 	serviceAccountToken string
66: }
67: 
68: type JWTManager struct {
69: 	privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey
70: 	publicKey  *rsa.PublicKey
71: 	clientset  kubernetes.Interface
72: 	mu         sync.RWMutex
73: }
74: 
75: const (
76: 	rsaKeySize         = 2048
77: 	jwtExpiration      = 5 * time.Minute
78: 	IdentitySecretName = "picod-router-identity"
79: 	PrivateKeyDataKey  = "private.pem"
80: 	PublicKeyDataKey   = "public.pem"
81: )
82: 
83: var IdentityNamespace = "default"
84: 
85: func init() {
86: 	if ns := os.Getenv("AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE"); ns != "" {
87: 		IdentityNamespace = ns
88: 	}
89: }
90: 
91: func NewJWTManager() (*JWTManager, error) {
92: 	privateKey, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, rsaKeySize)
93: 	if err != nil {
94: 		return nil, err
95: 	}
96: 
97: 	return &JWTManager{
98: 		privateKey: privateKey,
99: 		publicKey:  &privateKey.PublicKey,
100: 	}, nil
101: }
102: 
103: func (j *JWTManager) GenerateToken(claims map[string]interface{}) (string, error) {
104: 	now := time.Now()
105: 	jwtClaims := jwt.MapClaims{
106: 		"exp": now.Add(jwtExpiration).Unix(),
107: 		"iat": now.Unix(),
108: 		"iss": "agentcube-router",
109: 	}
110: 
111: 	for k, v := range claims {
112: 		jwtClaims[k] = v
113: 	}
114: 
115: 	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwtClaims)
116: 	return token.SignedString(j.privateKey)
117: }
118: 
119: func (j *JWTManager) LoadPublicKeyFromEnv() error {
120: 	keyData := os.Getenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
121: 	if keyData == "" {
122: 		return errors.New("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY environment variable is not set")
123: 	}
124: 
125: 	block, _ := pem.Decode([]byte(keyData))
126: 	if block == nil {
127: 		return errors.New("failed to decode PEM block")
128: 	}
129: 
130: 	pub, err := x509.ParsePKIXPublicKey(block.Bytes)
131: 	if err != nil {
132: 		return err
133: 	}
134: 
135: 	rsaPub, ok := pub.(*rsa.PublicKey)
136: 	if !ok {
137: 		return errors.New("not an RSA public key")
138: 	}
139: 
140: 	j.mu.Lock()
141: 	j.publicKey = rsaPub
142: 	j.mu.Unlock()
143: 
144: 	return nil
145: }
146: 
147: func (j *JWTManager) TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret() error {
148: 	cfg, err := rest.InClusterConfig()
149: 	if err != nil {
150: 		if errors.Is(err, rest.ErrNotInCluster) {
151: 			klog.Info("not running in cluster, skipping JWT identity secret creation")
152: 			return nil
153: 		}
154: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get in-cluster config: %w", err)
155: 	}
156: 
157: 	clientset, err := kubernetes.NewForConfig(cfg)
158: 	if err != nil {
159: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to create kubernetes client: %w", err)
160: 	}
161: 
162: 	j.clientset = clientset
163: 
164: 	_, err = clientset.CoreV1().Secrets(IdentityNamespace).Get(context.Background(), IdentitySecretName, metav1.GetOptions{})
165: 	if err == nil {
166: 		klog.Infof("JWT identity secret %s/%s already exists", IdentityNamespace, IdentitySecretName)
167: 		return nil
168: 	}
169: 
170: 	if !k8serrors.IsNotFound(err) {
171: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to check secret existence: %w", err)
172: 	}
173: 
174: 	privateKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
175: 		Type:  "RSA PRIVATE KEY",
176: 		Bytes: x509.MarshalPKCS1PrivateKey(j.privateKey),
177: 	})
178: 
179: 	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(j.publicKey)
180: 	if err != nil {
181: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal public key: %w", err)
182: 	}
183: 	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
184: 		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
185: 		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
186: 	})
187: 
188: 	secret := &corev1.Secret{
189: 		ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
190: 			Name:      IdentitySecretName,
191: 			Namespace: IdentityNamespace,
192: 		},
193: 		Type: corev1.SecretTypeOpaque,
194: 		Data: map[string][]byte{
195: 			PrivateKeyDataKey: privateKeyPEM,
196: 			PublicKeyDataKey:  publicKeyPEM,
197: 		},
198: 	}
199: 
200: 	_, err = clientset.CoreV1().Secrets(IdentityNamespace).Create(context.Background(), secret, metav1.CreateOptions{})
201: 	if err != nil {
202: 		if k8serrors.IsAlreadyExists(err) {
203: 			klog.Infof("JWT identity secret %s/%s already exists (race condition)", IdentityNamespace, IdentitySecretName)
204: 			return nil
205: 		}
206: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to create JWT identity secret: %w", err)
207: 	}
208: 
209: 	klog.Infof("Created JWT identity secret %s/%s", IdentityNamespace, IdentitySecretName)
210: 	return nil
211: }
212: 
213: func NewServer(config *Config) (*Server, error) {
214: 	s := &Server{
215: 		config:        config,
216: 		storeClient:   store.Storage(),
217: 		httpTransport: &http.Transport{IdleConnTimeout: 0, DisableCompression: false},
218: 	}
219: 
220: 	if config.MaxConcurrentRequests <= 0 {
221: 		config.MaxConcurrentRequests = 1000
222: 	}
223: 
224: 	jwtMgr, err := NewJWTManager()
225: 	if err != nil {
226: 		return nil, err
227: 	}
228: 
229: 	if err := jwtMgr.TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret(); err != nil {
230: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to bootstrap JWT identity secret: %w", err)
231: 	}
232: 
233: 	s.jwtManager = jwtMgr
234: 
235: 	sm, err := NewSessionManager(s.storeClient)
236: 	if err != nil {
237: 		return nil, err
238: 	}
239: 	s.sessionManager = sm
240: 
241: 	if config.Debug {
242: 		gin.SetMode(gin.DebugMode)
243: 	} else {
244: 		gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
245: 	}
246: 
247: 	s.engine = gin.New()
248: 	s.setupRoutes()
249: 
250: 	return s, nil
251: }
252: 
253: func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
254: 	s.engine.GET("/health/live", s.handleHealthLive)
255: 	s.engine.GET("/health/ready", s.handleHealthReady)
256: 
257: 	v1 := s.engine.Group("/v1")
258: 	v1.Use(gin.Logger(), gin.Recovery(), s.concurrencyLimitMiddleware())
259: 	{
260: 		v1.GET("/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path", s.handleAgentInvoke)
261: 		v1.POST("/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path", s.handleAgentInvoke)
262: 		v1.GET("/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path", s.handleCodeInterpreterInvoke)
263: 		v1.POST("/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path", s.handleCodeInterpreterInvoke)
264: 	}
265: }
266: 
267: func (s *Server) handleHealthLive(c *gin.Context) {
268: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "alive"})
269: }
270: 
271: func (s *Server) handleHealthReady(c *gin.Context) {
272: 	if s.sessionManager == nil {
273: 		c.JSON(http.StatusServiceUnavailable, gin.H{"status": "not ready", "error": "session manager not available"})
274: 		return
275: 	}
276: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ready"})
277: }
278: 
279: func (s *Server) concurrencyLimitMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
280: 	sem := make(chan struct{}, s.config.MaxConcurrentRequests)
281: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
282: 		select {
283: 		case sem <- struct{}{}:
284: 			defer func() { <-sem }()
285: 			c.Next()
286: 		default:
287: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusTooManyRequests, gin.H{
288: 				"error": "server overloaded, please try again later",
289: 				"code":  "SERVER_OVERLOADED",
290: 			})
291: 		}
292: 	}
293: }
294: 
295: func (s *Server) handleAgentInvoke(c *gin.Context) {
296: 	s.handleInvoke(c, types.AgentRuntimeKind)
297: }
298: 
299: func (s *Server) handleCodeInterpreterInvoke(c *gin.Context) {
300: 	s.handleInvoke(c, types.CodeInterpreterKind)
301: }
302: 
303: func (s *Server) handleInvoke(c *gin.Context, kind string) {
304: 	namespace := c.Param("namespace")
305: 	name := c.Param("name")
306: 	path := c.Param("path")
307: 
308: 	sessionID := c.GetHeader("x-agentcube-session-id")
309: 
310: 	ctx := c.Request.Context()
311: 
312: 	sandboxInfo, err := s.sessionManager.GetSandboxBySession(ctx, sessionID, namespace, name, kind)
313: 	if err != nil {
314: 		s.handleGetSandboxError(c, err)
315: 		return
316: 	}
317: 
318: 	s.storeClient.UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx, sandboxInfo.SessionID, time.Now())
319: 
320: 	if err := s.forwardToSandbox(c, sandboxInfo, path); err != nil {
321: 		s.handleProxyError(c, err)
322: 		return
323: 	}
324: 
325: 	s.storeClient.UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx, sandboxInfo.SessionID, time.Now())
326: }
327: 
328: func (s *Server) forwardToSandbox(c *gin.Context, sandboxInfo *types.SandboxInfo, path string) error {
329: 	if len(sandboxInfo.EntryPoints) == 0 {
330: 		c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "no entry point found for sandbox"})
331: 		return errors.New("no entry points")
332: 	}
333: 
334: 	var entryPoint *types.SandboxEntryPoint
335: 	for _, ep := range sandboxInfo.EntryPoints {
336: 		if ep.Path != "" && strings.HasPrefix(path, ep.Path) {
337: 			entryPoint = &ep
338: 			break
339: 		}
340: 	}
341: 	if entryPoint == nil {
342: 		entryPoint = &sandboxInfo.EntryPoints[0]
343: 	}
344: 
345: 	scheme := strings.ToLower(entryPoint.Protocol)
346: 	if scheme == "" {
347: 		scheme = "http"
348: 	}
349: 
350: 	targetURL := fmt.Sprintf("%s://%s", scheme, entryPoint.Endpoint)
351: 	target, err := url.Parse(targetURL)
352: 	if err != nil {
353: 		return err
354: 	}
355: 
356: 	proxy := httputil.NewSingleHostReverseProxy(target)
357: 	proxy.Transport = s.httpTransport
358: 
359: 	proxy.Director = func(req *http.Request) {
360: 		req.URL.Scheme = target.Scheme
361: 		req.URL.Host = target.Host
362: 		req.URL.Path = path
363: 		if !strings.HasPrefix(path, "/") && path != "" {
364: 			req.URL.Path = "/" + path
365: 		}
366: 		req.URL.RawPath = ""
367: 		req.Host = target.Host
368: 
369: 		req.Header.Set("X-Forwarded-Host", c.Request.Host)
370: 		proto := "http"
371: 		if c.Request.TLS != nil {
372: 			proto = "https"
373: 		}
374: 		req.Header.Set("X-Forwarded-Proto", proto)
375: 
376: 		clientIP := c.ClientIP()
377: 		if existing := req.Header.Get("X-Forwarded-For"); existing != "" {
378: 			req.Header.Set("X-Forwarded-For", existing+", "+clientIP)
379: 		} else {
380: 			req.Header.Set("X-Forwarded-For", clientIP)
381: 		}
382: 
383: 		if sandboxInfo.Kind == types.SandboxKind || sandboxInfo.Kind == types.SandboxClaimsKind {
384: 			token, err := s.jwtManager.GenerateToken(map[string]interface{}{
385: 				"session_id": sandboxInfo.SessionID,
386: 			})
387: 			if err != nil {
388: 				klog.Warningf("failed to generate JWT: %v", err)
389: 			} else {
390: 				req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+token)
391: 			}
392: 		}
393: 	}
394: 
395: 	proxy.ModifyResponse = func(resp *http.Response) error {
396: 		resp.Header.Set("x-agentcube-session-id", sandboxInfo.SessionID)
397: 		return nil
398: 	}
399: 
400: 	proxy.ServeHTTP(c.Writer, c.Request)
401: 	return nil
402: }
403: 
404: func (s *Server) handleGetSandboxError(c *gin.Context, err error) {
405: 	if apiErr, ok := err.(interface{ Status() metav1.Status }); ok {
406: 		code := int(apiErr.Status().Code)
407: 		if code == 0 {
408: 			code = 500
409: 		}
410: 		msg := apiErr.Status().Message
411: 		if msg == "" {
412: 			msg = err.Error()
413: 		}
414: 		if code == 500 {
415: 			msg = "internal server error"
416: 		}
417: 		c.JSON(code, gin.H{"error": msg})
418: 		return
419: 	}
420: 	c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "internal server error"})
421: }
422: 
423: func (s *Server) handleProxyError(c *gin.Context, err error) {
424: 	errMsg := err.Error()
425: 	if strings.Contains(errMsg, "connection refused") {
426: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadGateway, gin.H{"error": "sandbox unreachable"})
427: 		return
428: 	}
429: 	if strings.Contains(errMsg, "timeout") {
430: 		c.JSON(http.StatusGatewayTimeout, gin.H{"error": "sandbox timeout"})
431: 		return
432: 	}
433: 	c.JSON(http.StatusBadGateway, gin.H{"error": "sandbox unreachable"})
434: }
435: 
436: func NewSessionManager(storeClient store.Store) (SessionManager, error) {
437: 	addr := os.Getenv("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL")
438: 	if addr == "" {
439: 		return nil, errors.New("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL environment variable is not set")
440: 	}
441: 
442: 	serviceAccountToken := readServiceAccountToken()
443: 
444: 	return &manager{
445: 		storeClient:         storeClient,
446: 		workloadMgrAddr:     addr,
447: 		serviceAccountToken: serviceAccountToken,
448: 		httpClient: &http.Client{
449: 			Timeout: 2 * time.Minute,
450: 			Transport: &http.Transport{
451: 				MaxIdleConnsPerHost: 100,
452: 				DisableCompression:  false,
453: 			},
454: 		},
455: 	}, nil
456: }
457: 
458: func readServiceAccountToken() string {
459: 	tokenPath := "/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token"
460: 	data, err := os.ReadFile(tokenPath)
461: 	if err != nil {
462: 		klog.V(4).Infof("could not read service account token: %v", err)
463: 		return ""
464: 	}
465: 	return string(data)
466: }
467: 
468: func (m *manager) GetSandboxBySession(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, namespace string, name string, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
469: 	if sessionID != "" {
470: 		info, err := m.storeClient.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
471: 		if err != nil {
472: 			if errors.Is(err, store.ErrNotFound) {
473: 				return nil, api.NewSessionNotFoundError(sessionID)
474: 			}
475: 			return nil, err
476: 		}
477: 		return info, nil
478: 	}
479: 
480: 	var endpoint string
481: 	if kind == types.AgentRuntimeKind {
482: 		endpoint = fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/agent-runtime", m.workloadMgrAddr)
483: 	} else {
484: 		endpoint = fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/code-interpreter", m.workloadMgrAddr)
485: 	}
486: 
487: 	reqBody := types.CreateSandboxRequest{
488: 		Kind:      kind,
489: 		Name:      name,
490: 		Namespace: namespace,
491: 	}
492: 
493: 	return m.createSandbox(ctx, endpoint, &reqBody)
494: }
495: 
496: func (m *manager) createSandbox(ctx context.Context, endpoint string, req *types.CreateSandboxRequest) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
497: 	body, err := json.Marshal(req)
498: 	if err != nil {
499: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal request: %w", err)
500: 	}
501: 
502: 	httpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodPost, endpoint, bytes.NewReader(body))
503: 	if err != nil {
504: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create request: %w", err)
505: 	}
506: 	httpReq.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
507: 
508: 	if m.serviceAccountToken != "" {
509: 		httpReq.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+m.serviceAccountToken)
510: 	}
511: 
512: 	resp, err := m.httpClient.Do(httpReq)
513: 	if err != nil {
514: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to call workload manager: %w", err)
515: 	}
516: 	defer resp.Body.Close()
517: 
518: 	if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
519: 		var errResp struct {
520: 			Message string `json:"message"`
521: 			Error   string `json:"error"`
522: 		}
523: 		if err := json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&errResp); err != nil {
524: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("workload manager returned status %d", resp.StatusCode)
525: 		}
526: 		msg := errResp.Message
527: 		if msg == "" {
528: 			msg = errResp.Error
529: 		}
530: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("workload manager error: %s", msg)
531: 	}
532: 
533: 	var createResp types.CreateSandboxResponse
534: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&createResp); err != nil {
535: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to decode response: %w", err)
536: 	}
537: 
538: 	info := &types.SandboxInfo{
539: 		Kind:             req.Kind,
540: 		SandboxID:        createResp.SandboxID,
541: 		SandboxNamespace: req.Namespace,
542: 		Name:             createResp.SandboxName,
543: 		SessionID:        createResp.SessionID,
544: 		EntryPoints:      createResp.EntryPoints,
545: 		CreatedAt:        time.Now(),
546: 		ExpiresAt:        time.Now().Add(15 * time.Minute),
547: 		Status:           "running",
548: 	}
549: 
550: 	return info, nil
551: }
552: 
553: func (s *Server) Start(ctx context.Context) error {
554: 	addr := ":" + s.config.Port
555: 
556: 	h2s := &http2.Server{}
557: 	handler := h2c.NewHandler(s.engine, h2s)
558: 
559: 	s.httpServer = &http.Server{
560: 		Addr:        addr,
561: 		Handler:     handler,
562: 		ReadTimeout: 30 * time.Second,
563: 		IdleTimeout: 90 * time.Second,
564: 	}
565: 
566: 	klog.Infof("Starting router server on %s", addr)
567: 	return s.httpServer.ListenAndServe()
568: }
569: 
570: func (s *Server) Shutdown(ctx context.Context) error {
571: 	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 10*time.Second)
572: 	defer cancel()
573: 	return s.httpServer.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
574: }

<content>1: package agentd
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"time"
6: 
7: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/workloadmanager"
8: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
9: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
10: 	sandboxv1alpha1 "sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
11: 	ctrl "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime"
12: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
13: )
14: 
15: var SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
16: 
17: type Reconciler struct {
18: 	client.Client
19: 	Scheme *runtime.Scheme
20: }
21: 
22: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
23: 	sandbox := &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}
24: 	if err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox); err != nil {
25: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
26: 			return ctrl.Result{}, nil
27: 		}
28: 		return ctrl.Result{}, err
29: 	}
30: 
31: 	lastActivityStr, exists := sandbox.Annotations[workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey]
32: 	if !exists || lastActivityStr == "" {
33: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
34: 	}
35: 
36: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
37: 	if err != nil {
38: 		return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, err
39: 	}
40: 
41: 	expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
42: 
43: 	if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
44: 		if err := r.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil {
45: 			if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
46: 				return ctrl.Result{}, nil
47: 			}
48: 			return ctrl.Result{}, err
49: 		}
50: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
51: 	}
52: 
53: 	return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)}, nil
54: }
55: 
56: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error {
57: 	return ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).
58: 		For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}).
59: 		Complete(r)
60: }

88: type AuthManager struct {

90: 	mu        sync.RWMutex

93: func NewAuthManager() *AuthManager {
94: 	return &AuthManager{}
95: }
